items.title: FTX estate moves $17M in Solana while network staking activity remains strong
items.whyYouShouldCare: The FTX estate's $17M transfer in Solana highlights ongoing liquidity and confidence in the network, despite past controversies.

items.title: Pump.fun becomes Solana’s first $1B revenue platform as Ethereum, Base, BSC and Monad subdomains hint at cross-chain move
items.whyYouShouldCare: Pump.fun achieving $1B in revenue signals strong ecosystem growth and potential for cross-chain integration, enhancing Solana's competitive positioning.

items.title: Polychain backs VeryAI’s $10M raise to build palm-scan identity system on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Polychain's investment in VeryAI for a palm-scan identity system on Solana indicates increasing interest in innovative applications within the ecosystem.
